project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspace + turborepo) with 13 apps, 39 packages, 18 services
build_system: pnpm + turbo. Build pipeline: install -> typecheck -> test -> build -> lint. Each package has its own tsconfig and vitest config.
test_framework: vitest with globals enabled. Tests co-located with source files (*.test.ts) or in __tests__/ directories. No conftest, just standard vitest describe/it/expect.
verification_instructions: 1) pnpm install (frozen-lockfile), 2) pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/moderation..., 3) pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/moderation..., 4) pnpm turbo build --filter=@quant/moderation..., 5) pnpm turbo lint --filter=@quant/moderation...
snapshot_or_generated_files: dist/ directories generated by tsc, tsconfig.tsbuildinfo files. Not checked in (in .gitignore). No snapshot tests.
setup_instructions: pnpm install from root. Node >= 22 required. pnpm@10.28.1.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Can install npm packages freely. No Docker daemon needed for these changes since they are library-level.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs <=500 LOC per PR. Document contracts first. Cross-app data flow needs events not function calls. Performance budgets are gates. All gates must pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint, audit.
key_patterns: Services use class-based pattern with DI via constructor params. Types defined in types.ts with zod schemas for runtime validation. Tests co-located with .test.ts suffix. Barrel exports from index.ts. Moderation uses ModerationAPIClient interface for external API delegation. PolicyEngine evaluates ModerationResult against rules. ActionExecutor handles enforcement. Feature flags via environment variables.
directory_structure: packages/moderation/ - main moderation library (types, services, classifiers). services/moderation-worker/ - BullMQ worker that consumes jobs and routes to handlers. packages/media/ - media processing (upload, transcode, CDN). packages/auth/ - authentication providers (phone, quantmail, webauthn). packages/queue/ - job definitions and queue management.
